subject: [DCAEGEN2] Top up DCAEGEN2 images
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Top up DCAEGEN2 images

Top up following DCAEGEN2 images:
- DFC 1.7.1
- PM-Mapper 1.8.0
- PRH 1.8.0
- VES 1.11.0

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3006
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Icf8c08c42a002d131207201af7df1e7ced5e120e

Patch Set 13:

> Patch Set 13:
> 
> hv ves is failing
> is it normal?

Hi Sylvain, it's not related to the changes from this commit (hv-ves has no dependencies to any of the updated charts).
The issue with hv-ves test (which occurred in all gatings probably) is being worked on ( https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/testsuite/python-testing-utils/+/127501 - that commit should fix that as soon as the update is picked up by the gating runs )
